creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hey Aldis,

I've made a coupla small changes, including removing capitals from the 
port's directory (frowned upon).

I'm a little concerned by comments like #TODO and # Needs bsd.port.mk 
patches -- I've grabbed the second, are you still going to follow up the 
first? I can reopen it if you like.

Chris

http://people.freebsd.org/~crees/patches/visualizationlibrary.shar

-- 
This message has been scanned for viruses and
dangerous content by MailScanner, and is
believed to be clean.
